message:
🐛 Pass deploy token directly to Helm via --kube-token flag (#1480)

Kubectl works with the kubeconfig but Helm gets 401 when reading it.
Bypass kubeconfig for Helm by passing --kube-apiserver, --kube-ca-file,
and --kube-token directly. This eliminates any kubeconfig parsing
differences between kubectl and Helm client-go.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -136,8 +136,13 @@ jobs:
         continue-on-error: true
 
       - name: Deploy with Helm
+        env:
+          DEPLOY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VLLM_D_DEPLOY_TOKEN }}
         run: |
           helm upgrade --install kc ./deploy/helm/kubestellar-console \
+            --kube-apiserver https://kubernetes.default.svc \
+            --kube-ca-file /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/ca.crt \
+            --kube-token "$DEPLOY_TOKEN" \
             --namespace kc \
             --set image.repository=${{ env.REGISTRY }}/${{ env.IMAGE_NAME }} \
             --set image.tag=${{ github.sha }} \
